headline: White House issues 30-day Iran oil waiver to blunt global price surge
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration has issued a temporary 30-day sanctions waiver on Iranian oil "at sea," a move designed to inject approximately 140 million barrels of crude into a global market reeling from the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Tehran. The decision reflects growing White House anxiety over energy costs that have soared above the $100-a-barrel threshold.

headline: How The Chevron (CVX) Story Is Shifting With Oil Assumptions And Venezuela Growth Hopes
summary: Chevron’s updated fair value estimate now sits at US$192.29 per share, compared with the previous US$185.92, providing a fresh reference point for where some valuation models currently land. That shift is emerging alongside both bullish and bearish analyst views that depend on oil price assumptions, cash flow expectations, and how closely current equity pricing aligns with their sector outlooks. As you read on, you will see how these moving factors fit into the broader Chevron story and what...
